title: Causal DAG spec (CAUSAL family, DAGitty DSL)
description: Per Protocol §3.5. dsl is a DAGitty syntax string; acyclicity and exposure/outcome presence are enforced by the DAGitty parser in the integrity checker.

dsl.description: DAGitty DSL string, e.g. 'dag { x [exposure]; y [outcome]; u [latent]; x -> y; u -> x; u -> y }'.
